originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&__n_9` is never used.

sanitizedDescription: The value written to `&n` is never used.
presenceCondition:
(or (and CONFIG_SLOB (not CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER) CONFIG_SLOB)
    (and (not CONFIG_SLOB) (not CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER) (not CONFIG_SLOB)))
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_SLOB () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER () Bool
  false)
reasoning: 0f8f8094d28.c L41: 'int n = *cache;' — n is assigned but never subsequently read (loop body ends, n never used in any subsequent iteration or after the loop). Genuine dead store. PC simplifies to !CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER (CONFIG_SLOB cancels — both T and F cases in PC). The bug requires: !CONFIG_SLOB (for kmalloc_caches to be declared) AND CONFIG_LOCKDEP (for init_node_lock_keys to have the actual implementation). PC omits CONFIG_LOCKDEP=T (needed for the function to contain the bug code) and includes CONFIG_SLOB=T (non-compilable — kmalloc_caches undeclared). PC is under-constrained. New bug.
